title: Storex 10 Ltr Metal Ash Bucket with Lid Wooden Handle Tools Fireplace Container Fire Pits Wood Coal Burning Stove Metal Charcoal Bin Box Outdoor Indoor Galvanised Black Bucket
features: ✔️-Keep all your coal in one place with this Ash Bucket!
✔️-Helping to keep ash from being spread around the room, where it can be hard to shift the aroma
✔️-This bucket is handy especially if you have a wood burning stove or open fireplace.
description: EASY TO CARRY HANDLE - Metal Handle With a Wooden Grip Keeps It Sturdy and Comfortable to Carry MULTI-PURPOSE USE - Ideal Ash Bucket for Indoor and Outdoor Use. Perfect for Fireplaces, Hearths, Fire Pits, Pizza Ovens, Grills, Wood Burning Stoves, and More. Use It to Carry and Clean Up Ash, Coals, Pellets, Charcoal, and Embers SECURE LID - Ash Bucket Has a Tight-fitting Lid to Ensure That Hot Embers and Ash Stay Inside, Helping to Prevent Burns While Cleaning, and Keeping Your Hearth or Patio Neat and Tidy DURABLE & STURDY - Ash Bucket Is Made of Strong Galvanized Iron Material With Black Powder Coating, Which Can Provide Good Protection From High Temperature, Extending Its Service Life IDEAL CONTAINER - Makes an Ideal Storage Container, Place Next to the Fireplace or Fire Pit to Safely Store Kindling Wood, Coal, Fire Glass, Pellets or Other Fireplace Items
